sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38260" key="e)papogame/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαπογᾰμέω</orth>, <sense id="n38260.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marry again,</tr_> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
